summary: Aggregator's swap function passed user-controlled call data to arbitrary tokens, allowing attacker to invoke transferFrom against any approved user of LIFI router.
attack_trace: Submit swap call with crafted target = victim token, data = transferFrom(victim, attacker, amount)
Router executes transferFrom on victim's behalf
Drain users who had unlimited approvals
root_cause: swapAndStartBridge accepted arbitrary low-level calls without validating that the target was a whitelisted DEX or token.
